description: Weather and surface parameters drifted from the scenario baseline. The test remained valid but needs tighter configuration control. The event was closed after offline triage.
The planned deceleration profile produced an abrupt stop near the stop line. The event was recoverable but reduced ride comfort. The issue is useful for scenario-library expansion.
Issue logs were uploaded later than expected after the run. The complete data package became available after retry. The case should be compared against the latest regression run.
The perception stack detected a nearby road user later than expected. The delay reduced downstream reaction margin but did not create a collision. The record is suitable for module-owner follow-up.
A body signal briefly disagreed with the expected closed-door state. The system raised a warning and held the current mode. The event was closed after offline triage.
The planner yielded longer than necessary at a low-speed merge. Traffic behind the ego vehicle slowed during the hesitation. The issue is useful for scenario-library expansion.
The model reported a static obstacle in a clear lane. Planning slowed the vehicle unnecessarily before the object track disappeared. The case should be compared against the latest regression run.
The requested acceleration was applied later than expected after a stop. The vehicle created a small gap to the leading traffic flow. The event was closed after offline triage.
Lane markings alternated between valid and invalid states. The unstable signal caused lateral planning to become conservative. The case should be compared against the latest regression run.
A neighboring vehicle's future path oscillated between keep-lane and cut-in hypotheses. Planning reacted with repeated speed adjustments. The record is suitable for module-owner follow-up.
The model reported a static obstacle in a clear lane. Planning slowed the vehicle unnecessarily before the object track disappeared. The record is suitable for module-owner follow-up.
The heading estimate drifted during a low-speed turn. Control compensated after the localization confidence recovered. The case should be compared against the latest regression run.
Two issue records referenced the same event window. The duplicate can be merged during manual review. The issue is useful for scenario-library expansion.
